title: Convert Roman Numeral to Integer
description:
Given a roman numeral, convert it to an integer.

Roman numerals are represented by seven symbols: I=1, V=5, X=10, L=50, C=100, D=500, M=1000.
hints: Create a map of roman symbols to their values.
If a smaller value appears before a larger value, subtract it.
Otherwise, add the value to the result.
